title: dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. deweveri
intro: Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. deweveri, also known as the Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. deweveri orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to certain parts of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. deweveri include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots in water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
